style: warm editorial beige paper texture classic serif margins clinical markers minimalist modern contemporary integration
description: Designed using a Warm Editorial visual layout style. The canvas features a tactile beige handmade paper texture as the background, bounded by wide, generous margins reminiscent of high-fashion print magazines. The product is framed off-center, accented by delicate charcoal grey lines and tiny clinical-style numbering markers (e.g., '01', '02') that point to key craft details. Classic serif typography from the Italiana and Lora pairing establishes an intellectual, curated tone, perfectly capturing the Minimalist/Contemporary Integration angle.
